name: Iron Horse Acquisition II Corp.
summary: PARTI General We are a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands as an exempted company whose business purpose is to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. On November 26, 2024, we initially incorporated in Delaware as Iron Horse Acquisitions Corp. II. On July 25, 2025, Iron Horse Acquisitions Corp.
